# Strata Portfolio Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Premium portfolio website for Strata, a software development company. Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Animations:** Framer Motion
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **Theme:** next-themes (dark/light toggle)

## Design Principles
- Dark-first design (near-black background)
- Large, bold, confident typography
- Glass/subtle gradient effects
- Premium, minimal, futuristic aesthetic
- Inspired by Apple and modern SaaS platforms

## Project Structure
- `src/app/` — App Router pages and layouts
- `src/components/` — Reusable UI components
- `src/components/sections/` — Page sections (Hero, Services, etc.)
- `src/data/` — Static data for projects, services, tech stack
- `src/lib/` — Utility functions

## Sections
1. Navigation — Sticky, dark/light toggle, smooth scroll
2. Hero — Cinematic, bold headline "Software Built in Layers."
3. Portfolio/Work — Project cards with case study pages
4. Services — SaaS Dev, Platform Eng, API, Automation, Cloud
5. Tech Stack — Visual icons/labels
6. About — Company philosophy
7. Contact — Form with name, email, description, budget

## Completed Steps
- [x] copilot-instructions.md created
- [x] Project scaffolded with Next.js 14
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] All sections built
- [x] Dark/light mode implemented
- [x] Compiled and running
